Compiler¶

The Beetle compiler transforms Beetle code into C.

Pipeline¶

  1. Lexer

  2. Parser

  3. AST

  4. C code generation

  5. Compilation with GCC

Exemple¶

Beetle:

print("Hi")

C generated:

printf("Hi");

Beetle
